title: Iran's miscalculation has 'destroyed everything', Qatar's PM says
description: In an exclusive interview, Qatar's prime minister delivered a blunt message from the Gulf to Iran: the attacks must stop.
content:
Sheikh Mohammed bin Abdulrahman al Thani has described Iran's strikes on Gulf countries as a "dangerous miscalculation" - warning the escalation risks destabilising the region and sending shockwaves through the global economy.

title: Paddington musical sweeps WhatsOnStage awards
description: Other winners at the event included Jonathan Bailey, Rachel Zegler, Amber Davies and Sir Stephen Fry.
content:
Paddington The Musical has dominated the WhatsOnStage Awards, winning nine prizes after its triumphant launch in the West End last year.

title: NHS England pauses new prescriptions of cross-sex hormones for under-18s
description: The health service said young people who already receive the drugs will continue to do so.
content:
NHS England has paused new prescriptions of cross-sex hormones to 16 and 17-year-olds who question their gender, after a review found previous research into how harmful or beneficial the drugs may be was "really weak".

title: Glasgow Central: Building collapses at station as fire causes major disruption
description: Dozens of services have since been cancelled and the station will be closed until further notice.
content:
'No significant damage' at Central Station
Teams at Network Rail have been keeping across any potential fire damage at Central Station.

title: Spain's migrants welcome amnesty: 'It will help us in every way'
description: Madrid cites humanitarian and economic reasons to give undocumented workers legal status.
content:
Diana left her native Peru two years ago, looking for financial and professional stability in Europe.
